core_mechanism: Non-perturbative resummation of a bilinear (quadratic) coupling between two linear modes to all orders into exact closed-form 'dressed' two-point solutions, so that a three-point correlation function collapses to a single vertex integral evaluable by a Schwinger-parameter integration over factorized per-leg kernels
brief_reason: The abstract's whole method rests on treating the quadratic mixing between the two fluctuation modes non-perturbatively via an operator representation of the exact linear solutions, which reduces every tree-level three-point function to one vertex diagram computed with a Schwinger-parameter integral over independent pre-computable leg kernels.
